dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The roar of the crowd. The smell of freshly cut grass. The tension that hangs heavy in the air. For some, it's just a game. For others, it's everything.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Jinwoo
dialogue.line: Another fastball, right down the middle. Minjun’s arm looks tired. He’s been throwing heat all game, but the pressure… it's getting to him.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACK!

dialogue.speaker: Crowd
dialogue.line: OOOHHH!

dialogue.speaker: Coach Lee
dialogue.line: Dammit! A line drive to left field! Another run scores! Park Minjun, what are you doing out there?!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Jinwoo
dialogue.line: Two outs, bottom of the seventh. We're down 5-3. Bases loaded. The cleanup hitter is up. This is the moment that decides the game. The moment that decides our season.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWACK!

dialogue.speaker: Umpire
dialogue.line: BALL ONE!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Jinwoo
dialogue.line: Minjun’s shoulders are slumped. His pitches are losing their bite. He’s trying to force it, but his control is gone. I know that feeling all too well.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FLASHBACK SOUND: WHOOSH

dialogue.speaker: Kim Jinwoo (younger)
dialogue.line: Just one more strike! You can do it, Jinwoo!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACK! (sound of a bat connecting hard)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Jinwoo (younger)
dialogue.line: No… not again…

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: POP! (sound of a shoulder dislocating)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Jinwoo
dialogue.line: I remember the pain. The crushing weight of expectation, then the sudden, searing agony in my shoulder. That was the day I lost my fastball. The day I stepped off the mound for good.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWACK!

dialogue.speaker: Umpire
dialogue.line: BALL TWO!

dialogue.speaker: Coach Lee
dialogue.line: Minjun, take a deep breath! You're rushing!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Jinwoo
dialogue.line: He can't hear him. Not now. He's trapped in his own head. Just like I was.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWACK!

dialogue.speaker: Umpire
dialogue.line: BALL THREE!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Jinwoo
dialogue.line: Three balls, no strikes. The batter is waiting for his pitch. Minjun is one pitch away from walking in a run, maybe even losing the game right here.

dialogue.speaker: Coach Lee
dialogue.line: This is bad… Who do I even have left? The bullpen is empty. Everyone’s arms are shot.

dialogue.speaker: Coach Lee
dialogue.line: He glances down the bench, his eyes scanning each player. He pauses, his gaze lingering on me for a fraction of a second. No. He wouldn't.

dialogue.speaker: Coach Lee
dialogue.line: Jinwoo! Get warmed up!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Jinwoo
dialogue.line: My heart leaps into my throat. Me? After all this time? My shoulder… it hasn't felt a real pitch in years. Not a competitive one, anyway.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWACK!

dialogue.speaker: Umpire
dialogue.line: BALL FOUR! RUNNER ADVANCES! THAT'S A WALK!

dialogue.speaker: Crowd
dialogue.line: BOOOOOO!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The tying run crosses home plate. The score is now 5-4. Bases are still loaded. And the winning run stands on third.

dialogue.speaker: Coach Lee
dialogue.line: Minjun, come on out. Jinwoo, you're in. Get out there!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Jinwoo
dialogue.line: The weight of the game, the season, the expectations… it all falls on me. My heart is pounding. My hands are shaking. But as I stand, the familiar scent of the dirt, the distant roar of the crowd… a strange calm washes over me.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Jinwoo
dialogue.line: It's been so long. But the mound… it's calling to me.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUMP-THUMP (heartbeat)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Kim Jinwoo, a forgotten talent, steps onto the pitcher's mound once more. His past, his injury, his doubt… can he overcome them and reclaim his place as the King of the Mound?

summary: During a critical high school baseball game, the team's ace pitcher falters under pressure, forcing Coach Lee to call upon Kim Jinwoo, a former promising pitcher sidelined by injury and doubt, to step onto the mound in a high-stakes moment.
